name: Chinedu
praise_text: Nwa amadi ike di n’aka onye siri ike
meaning: Strong child with power in his hands

name: Ada
praise_text: Ada mara mma nwaanyị eji eje mba

name: Obinna
praise_text: Nwa nke nna ya ji eme ọnụ
meaning: Child that brings pride to the father

name: Ifeoma
praise_text: Ifeoma nwa ọma nwa amara na ịhụnanya Ifeoma onye juputara n’ịhụnanya na ebere nwa nne ji obi ya kpọrọ ihe nwa a mụrụ ka ọ bụrụ ngọzi n’ụlọ Ifeoma nke obi ọma na-akpali ndị ọzọ onye na-eweta udo na obi ụtọ ebe ọ bụla ọ gara nwa mara mma nke na-enwu dịka anyanwụ Ifeoma onye a na-eto n’ihi àgwà ọma ya onye nwere obi ebere na ịdị umeala n’obi nwa nke chi ya na-eche nche onye na-ebute ọganihu na ezinụlọ ya Ifeoma nwa dị nsọ nke na-efegharị ịhụnanya n’ụwa onye na-adịgide n’ọma na ịdị mma nwa nke a na-echekwa nke ọma onye na-eme ka obi dị ndị mmadụ ụtọ
meaning: Good child filled with love and kindness

name: Emeka
praise_text: Nwa nwere nnukwu ihe chi nyere ya

name: Kelechi
praise_text: Onye chi nyere ike na ndu
meaning: One blessed with strength by God
